text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the practice match arrives. It's time for
us to go up against Team Zenith once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They utterly crushed us last time, but this time is
different. Our team is much more cohesive now,
and we only lose by a hair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:

different. Our team is much more cohesive now,
and we only lose by a hair.

text_block_list.text:

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They utterly crushed us last time, but this time is

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They utterly crushed us last time, but this time is
different. Our team is much more cohesive now,
and we only lose by a hair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and Little Cocon face off
one-on-one again. It's a close fight, but Rice
Shower isn't able to close the slim margin
between them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We may have lost the practice match, but it's
evident how much progress we've made since we
started.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, Director Akikawa returns. We thought
she would step in and stop Ms. Kashimoto, but
she instead decides to let things be for a little
longer.
